en: Select the country where your company is officially incorporated and maintains its legal registration. This should be the same country listed in your company's official registration documents.
Please select the country in which your company is legally domiciled and registered.
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

Upload a current and valid document issued by your national authority responsible for company registrations. This may be a certificate of incorporation, a commercial register extract, or any official document proving your business is duly registered. The document must clearly show your company name, registration number, and issuing authority.
Please upload your company’s official proof of registration with the Chamber of Commerce or equivalent authority in the selected country.
